creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: Kyle, could you please try my patch from: https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/pull/16110 ?  I haven't seen hangs myself, but had performance issues on SSDs not supporting cache flush.  If it won't help, it would be nice to get `procstat -akk` output or equivalent full kernel stacks dump (`show stacks`?) from kernel to see what exactly could cause the blockage.
